name: IB-Tools
author: TehMuffinMoo
description: This PHP-EF plugin enables various tools for use by Infoblox SAs.

changes: Update Orphaned CMDB chart to use asset type
Fixed percentage calculation for Idle/Orphaned cloud assets

Introduce new logarithmic scale for DNS Complexity. Complexity is now capped at 200, with a base scale of 2000 for the logarithmic calculation. This change was made to better accommodate the wide range of DNS complexity metrics observed in real-world environments, while still providing meaningful differentiation between low, medium and high complexity levels.
Include template name in progress updates for Cloud Assessment
Add various new slides to template to include CMDB Reconciliation data
Update various components for Cloud exclusive and All Assets to align with the new template
Overhauled a number of existing API calls to align with new cube structure
Include support for Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) in Cloud Assessment
Add support for macro-enabled pptm files in Cloud Assessment configuration and report generation
Capitalize SOC Insight Titles in Security Assessment reports
Minor bugfixes with namespaces and unique descriptors
Fix issue where upload button was missing for cloud assessment templates
Bug fix for when only one SOC Insight present
Add a number of new pages
Add support for pptm
Rebrand GCP to Google Cloud
Add initial reports for anonymised metric collection
Add DoH Support to DNS Toolbox
Add anonymised metric collection for Security Assessments
Various cleanup, move DNS Toolbox to IB-Tools
Minor style changes
Fix bug with Cloud Assessment including DNS records with Zone Data
Bug fixes to Threat Actor Query
Apply consistent styling to all pages
Unique descriptor bugfixes on configuration pages
First release of the Cloud Assessment
Bug fixes & improvements to Security Assessment
